full_text:
Ying Yu (Zizheng)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ying Yu, styledZizheng, was born in Nanyang. Took seven arrows in a vain attempt to help Dongli Gun escape but managed to persuade the rebels to treat the man well. Ying Yu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Ying Yu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
